channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI culture war: Hidden bias in training models may push political propaganda
item.description: The release of Chinese-made DeepSeek has generated heated debate, but critics have largely ignored a huge problem: the potential for China to use such an AI model to push a cultural and political agenda on the rest of the world.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: The Trump administration's use of a popular app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mainframe Modernization Gets a Boost from Kyndryl and Google Cloud
item.description: Kyndryl and Google Cloud expand their partnership to help customers modernize mainframes with generative AI, improving data access and integration with cloud resources.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: StreamElements Confirms Data Breach: Hundreds of Thousands Affected
item.description: Cloud-based streaming tools provider StreamElements has confirmed suffering a data breach after a hacker compromised one of the company's former third parties, affecting hundreds of thousands of customers.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: The governing body of figure skating has embarked on an ambitious plan called “Vision 2030,” and the idea is simple: Make the sport cool again.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White House taps Musk to investigate Signal chat mishap
item.description: The White House has asked Elon Musk and his team at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) to help investigate how a journalist was included on a Signal chat with national security officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach
item.description: Pete Waterman, the director of the cloud security program known as FedRAMP, said four new community working groups will help give industry a bigger voice. The post Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Otter.ai’s voice-activated AI agent can answer questions during online meetings
item.description: Otter.ai, which is primarily known for its voice-to-text transcription service, is rolling out a voice-activated AI agent that will participate in and answer questions during online calls.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scary AI-powered swarm robots team up to build cars faster than ever
item.description: UBTech and Zeekr unite with AI robot swarms to make car manufacturing faster and smarter. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how the process works.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prompt engineering courses and certifications tech companies want
item.description: Prompt engineering is the process of structuring or creating an instruction to produce the best possible output from a generative AI model. Industries such as healthcare, banking, financial services, insurance, and retail all have use cases for prompt engineering, says the report.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Protect your files and memories with simple spring cleaning tips
item.description: To protect memories, documents and personal data, you should back up your information on personal drives, according to Kurt the CyberGuy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia Invests Billions in US Amid Trump's Onshoring Push - Fox News
item.description: AI chipmaker Nvidia invests billions in the US amid President Trump's push to bring manufacturing back home. Learn about the latest AI technology advancements and challenges with Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
